read_authority_boundary: Adapter may read local policy and release evidence for the linked v8.1 work item only.
write_authority_boundary: Adapter has no write authority and cannot mutate external systems.
freshness_check: Before reuse, confirm policy and release docs match the active release manifest.
side_effect_boundary: Read-only adapter has no external side effects.
not_proven: Adapter readiness does not prove provider output correctness, credential safety, billing safety, or operator acceptance.
